title: Realismcraft
description: Realism to minecraft. I made it for my friends.
body:
RealismCraft is a medium-sized modpack with around 200 carefully chosen mods that work together to make Minecraft feel more grounded, challenging, and immersive. It is designed for multiplayer play but works smoothly in singleplayer as well.

This modpack adds a wide range of realism-focused features, including:

More detailed survival needs such as temperature, environment hazards, and more realistic world behavior

Improved world generation with natural structures, terrain, and ecosystems

Tweaked combat, movement, and progression to feel more natural and believable

Enhanced visuals, sound, and atmosphere to match a realistic playstyle

You might want to download RealismCraft if you enjoy slow-paced, immersive survival worlds where decision-making and planning matter. It aims to make the game feel more like a real environment while still staying fun and playable.

Important notes before downloading:

This pack contains around 200 mods and may require a mid-range to strong PC for smooth performance.

Multiplayer servers should allocate enough RAM depending on player count and world size.

Some mods modify survival difficulty, so expect a more challenging experience compared to vanilla Minecraft.

RealismCraft is meant to give players a grounded and a tad bit more believable version of Minecraft while still keeping some of its fantasy elements, whether you are exploring alone or with friends.
